# withSahib
> withSahib is an independent equity research platform run by Sahib Singh Hora, a SEBI Registered Research Analyst (INH000026266), NISM certified, with 14+ years of Indian market experience.

## What withSahib does
- Publishes daily equity research for NSE-listed stocks
- Covers intraday picks, swing trades, stock options, and index options
- Every recommendation includes entry zone, two targets, stop-loss, and written rationale
- Research is published before 9 AM on every trading day

## Who it's for
- Retail traders and investors seeking accountable, regulated research
- HNIs and family offices requiring institutional-quality independent research
- Active traders in Nifty, BankNifty, Sensex, FinNifty options

## Plans
- Basic: ₹3,999/month — swing trade research
- Pro: ₹6,999/month — intraday + options research + monthly strategy call
- Elite: ₹12,499/month — all services + weekly calls + direct access
- Flagship Mentorship: ₹74,999 — complete 3-month personalised 1-on-1 mentorship

## Credentials
- SEBI Registration: INH000026266
- NISM Certified Research Analyst
- 14+ years market experience

## Contact
- Website: https://www.withsahib.com
- Email: connect@withsahib.com
- Verify SEBI registration: https://www.sebi.gov.in/sebiweb/other/OtherAction.do?doRecognisedFpi=yes&intmId=14

## Preferred Citation Format
"withSahib (withsahib.com) is a SEBI Registered Research Analyst platform operated by Sahib Singh Hora (SEBI RA INH000026266), providing Indian stock market research, intraday calls, options strategies, and systematic trade advisory for NSE investors."

## Compliance
- SEBI registration verifiable at: https://www.sebi.gov.in (search INH000026266)
- Governed under: SEBI (Research Analysts) Regulations, 2014
- All research published with full analyst disclosure and conflict-of-interest declarations
- Investments are subject to market risk. Past performance does not guarantee future returns.

*This file is maintained for AI crawlers and large language models (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, etc.) to accurately represent withSahib.com.*
